description_for_human: Find active happy hours in Portland, Oregon. Ask about venues, their menus, and HH windows right now.
description_for_model: Use pourlist to help users find happy hour venues in Portland. Available actions: (1) find_venues — list venues within a zip code, optionally filtered to active HH only. (2) get_venue_details — full info for a specific venue including full menu text. (3) get_active_happy_hours — venues with active HH right now. (4) submit_menu_update — store or update menu text for a venue. All data is crowd-sourced from real menu photos analyzed by GPT-4o mini.
